name: Economics: Supply and Demand Graph
description: Create a 2-page economics lesson flipchart in ActivInspire demonstrating Market Equilibrium and a Shift in Demand. The first page, titled 'Market Equilibrium', must contain a standard X/Y graph with axes labeled 'Price' and 'Quantity', intersecting 'Supply' and 'Demand' curves, and the intersection labeled 'Equilibrium'. The second page, titled 'Increase in Demand', must contain a similar graph with Price/Quantity axes and a Supply curve, but featuring two Demand curves showing a rightward shift, an arrow indicating the shift direction, and a text label mentioning 'Shift' or 'Increase'. Save the completed flipchart to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/supply_demand_lesson.flipchart.
